title: Verify cross-backend consistency test coverage completeness
description: PRD §4 requires all backends pass the same test suite. Verify that test/cross-backend.test.js and test/cross-backend-extra.test.js cover all 6 backends (AgenticStore, OPFS, NodeFs, Memory, SQLite, LocalStorage) for: get/set/delete/list/scan/stat/batchGet/batchSet. Add missing coverage if gaps found. Target: PRD §4 cross-backend consistency tests gap.
